name: Impossible Beef and Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Beef; cooked and cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
3. Layer the beef, onion, celery, tomatoes, and cheese in the dish.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients together until smooth: 15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with an electric mixer on high.
5. Pour the mixture into the dish.
6. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
7. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired. Serves: 8-10.
High Altitude: Increase baking time by 25-30 minutes.
